title: Counter-Idiom Lab

fields.vision: This bundle turns Nik Murano's counter-idiom work into a production-ready dual-deployment: the internal Axiom Forge room inside MuranoOS (archive + lab + training ground + publishing press) and a public Counter-Idiom Lab section for the separate creative/culture site, with exact public page copy, a static prototype, and a 20-specimen seed corpus.
fields.mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
fields.built_components: Documented handoff or prototype; live status still to verify
fields.source_utilization: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need selective close-reading before adopting style doctrine. Source pool: 64 deduplicated local title candidates; 61 catalogue support rows. Examples: Narrative and Narration: Analyzing Cinematic Storytelling; Camera Lucida. Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling. Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact project-method and creativity passages. Source pool: 151 deduplicated local title candidates; 154 catalogue support rows. Examples: Creativity Research; The Heritage, Creativity and Innovation Nexus. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: You need to launch a substantive public section of nikmurano.com that is not decorative — instead showcasing disciplined method + editorial protocol + failure preservation. Or you need to build a MuranoOS internal room (The Axiom Forge) that produces aphoristic content under rubric-gated editorial discipline. The bundle supports both on the same object model. Entry point: 00_README_START_HERE.md — 02_ROOM_SPEC.md — 07_LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md — 11_PROTOTYPE/index.html. Integration target: Public site — [local source path omitted] (canonical portfolio; NOT deprecated [local source path omitted]). MuranoOS — Program Labs section of the public site; internal Axiom Forge room. Wire or preserve the implementation files: Static HTML prototype at 11_PROTOTYPE/index.html — ready to upload as-is or re-skin into a framework. Data binding via library.json. No framework code; no backend.
fields.status: Documented handoff or prototype; live status still to verify
fields.remaining_gaps: Promote the packet from documented handoff to live implementation only after the declared caveats are resolved: apply or wire the scaffold, run the stated validation or smoke-test sequence, and keep unresolved assumptions visible.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This bundle turns Nik Murano's counter-idiom work into a production-ready dual-deployment: the internal Axiom Forge room inside MuranoOS (archive + lab + training ground + publishing press) and a public Counter-Idiom Lab section for the separate creative/culture site, with exact public page copy, a static prototype, and a 20-specimen seed corpus. Internal motto: "Common sense is an attack surface." Public subtitle: "A study in subverting overused axioms without breaking logic." The room's thesis: idioms are compressed judgments. Every proverb has a scene, beneficiary, victim, hidden premise, and implied moral. The room exposes those hidden structures and generates counter-idioms that preserve the original's recognizability, keep the key image intact, remain logically coherent, and reveal a sharper or darker truth.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: This bundle turns Nik Murano's counter-idiom work into a production-ready dual-deployment: the internal Axiom Forge room inside MuranoOS (archive + lab + training ground + publishing press) and a public Counter-Idiom Lab section for the separate creative/culture site, with exact public page copy, a static prototype, and a 20-specimen seed corpus.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It makes adversarial language and influence mechanisms inspectable by separating phrase, channel, target perception, amplification path, and judgment effect.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

instruments.operation: treats `Axiom Forge` as a room or workbench component that gives the project a usable surface rather than only a written description. Source context: This bundle turns Nik Murano's counter-idiom work into a production-ready dual-deployment: the internal Axiom Forge room inside MuranoOS (archive + lab + training ground + publishing press) and a public Counter-Idiom Lab section for the separate creative/culture site, with exact public page copy, a static prototype, and a 20-specimen seed corpus.
instruments.output: a room, workbench, or interface function tied to `Axiom Forge`
instruments.upstream_dependency: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits.
instruments.downstream_use: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: You need to launch a substantive public section of nikmurano.com that is not decorative — instead showcasing disciplined method +.
instruments.proof: This bundle turns Nik Murano's counter-idiom work into a production-ready dual-deployment: the internal Axiom Forge room inside MuranoOS (archive + lab + training ground + publishing press) and a public Counter-Idiom Lab section for the separate.
